free_text: Elastic scattering of deuterons by alpha particles
The gas target
The chamber can hold 32 detectors,
16 in the top half and the rest in the bottom half.
The angle-independent errors
Errors amounted to 1% in the forward
angles and to 5% in some backward angles
The total error was on the average
around 5.3% and in the few cases as high as 7.5%.
Error from error bars on fig. No information
about source of uncertainty (probably total).
Compilation produced by Arzamas RFNC-VNIIEF
